response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong distributed systems experience, deep full-stack proficiency in Python-adjacent languages (TypeScript, Node.js), and clear ownership of complex infrastructure — including AI-agent tooling and high-throughput systems — aligning well with the role's core demands. His open-source contributions and operational depth (CI/CD, on-call readiness) reinforce fit, though limited explicit Python mastery and AI/ML product experience are minor gaps.
strengths: Proven experience in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling at Acme Software
Strong track record in high-throughput, distributed systems (e.g., millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Operational ownership demonstrated via CI/CD, on-call readiness, and open-source tooling contributions
concerns: Resume lacks explicit mention of Python as a primary language despite it being a must-have
No clear evidence of direct LLM/ML product experience or AI-native engineering environments
German language skill is only basic, potentially limiting stakeholder alignment in Berlin-based team
